creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
PR ports/194393 is closed, but corebird fails with the hereunder error:

===>  Configuring for corebird-0.9
You should add the contents of '/usr/local/share/aclocal/intltool.m4' to 'aclocal.m4'.
cp: m4/intltool.m4: No such file or directory
intltoolize: cannot copy '/usr/local/share/aclocal/intltool.m4' to 'm4/intltool.m4'
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/net-im/corebird

Have you an updated patch for this issue?

Note: for my own test version, I have been lazy, and I just used

do-configure:
	(cd ${WRKSRC} && ./autogen.sh --prefix=${PREFIX})

It works, but this is not very smart...
